summary: Completed comprehensive testing of e-commerce platform with real-time alerting system. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend dashboard working with minor UI display issues in alert history details.

fixed_issues.issue: MongoDB duplicate key error when inserting alerts with _id: None
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Removed _id field to let MongoDB auto-generate

ui_bugs.issue: Alert history items not displaying detailed content properly (title, message, timestamp, action fields not parsed correctly)
Close button selector timeout when trying to close alerts dropdown

passed_tests: GET /api/alerts returns list of alerts (found 1 alert)
Critical alert banner appears when SRI < 0.1
Alerts tab shows summary (Critical: 1, Warning: 0, Resolved: 0)
Alert thresholds display correctly (SRI < 0.1, SRI < 0.3, Latency > 200ms, Error > 10%)
Bell icon in header shows unread count (badge: 1)
WebSocket endpoint /ws/alerts exists and is reachable
Generate Traffic button triggers alert checks
Real metrics API with SRI calculation
Alert system triggers when SRI drops below threshold
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix alert history display formatting in frontend - alert items should show title, message, timestamp, and action fields clearly. The alert data is being received correctly from backend but UI parsing/display needs improvement.

success_percentage.integration: 95% (WebSocket endpoint exists but external connection testing failed due to network/SSL)
